home.title: Control your energy with ElectroCorp
home.content: Monitor devices, automate routines and review energy consumption from a modern platform.

home.scheduledAlarmsDescription: Global actions enabled for the site.

home.noActiveModeDescription: Active site modes will appear here.

home.noReadingsDescription: When energy readings exist, the summary will appear here.

home.noActiveGoalsDescription: Create goals to compare consumption against real targets.

about.title: A platform for organizing energy, spaces and decisions
about.subtitle: ElectroCorp helps use energy with more clarity: organize sites and rooms, control devices, automate routines and modes, review consumption, goals, alerts, service, billing and preferences from one place.

order.label: Order
order.title: Spaces before actions
order.description: The platform works better when you first define real sites, rooms and assignments.

control.label: Control
control.title: Devices with context
control.description: Devices, groups, routines and modes are easier to understand through the place and daily use they represent.

clarity.label: Clarity
clarity.title: Visible energy
clarity.description: Consumption, reports and goals depend on real readings to guide better decisions.

what.title: ElectroCorp connects spaces, devices and energy
what.description: It is not a decorative screen or an isolated list of actions. It is a platform for managing spaces, controlling equipment, creating useful automations, reviewing consumption, receiving alerts and following service, maintenance, billing and preferences.

points.spaces: Sites, rooms and assignments as the base of the system.
points.control: Devices, groups, routines and modes for daily operation.
points.energy: Consumption, history, reports and goals based on available information.
points.care: Alerts, rules, service and preferences to act with order.

mission.title: Help use energy with order, control and clarity
mission.description: ElectroCorp is designed for homes, small sites and medium spaces that need to know where their equipment is, how it is used and what decisions to make to consume better.

vision.title: An intelligent, ordered and preventive energy platform
vision.description: The vision is to grow as a tool that connects operation, consumption, alerts and service with increasing precision, while staying transparent about what is truly available.

daily.title: A practical flow for operating ElectroCorp
daily.description: The recommended use starts from the physical space and moves toward control, automation, energy review and follow-up.

site.title: Choose or create an active site
site.description: Work from a clear site so rooms, devices and actions have context.

rooms.title: Organize rooms
rooms.description: Use real rooms to place equipment and keep the operational map understandable.

devices.title: Review devices
devices.description: Turn equipment on or off and validate its state from operation views.

groups.title: Group by use
groups.description: Create semantic groups such as lighting, climate or critical equipment to act on sets.

routines.title: Schedule repeatable routines
routines.description: Use routines for frequent schedules and avoid duplicating manual actions every day.

mode.title: Apply complete modes
mode.description: Modes help activate full situations, such as saving, night or work, with internal routines.

energy.title: Review consumption
energy.description: Use the dashboard and history to understand available energy behavior.

goals.title: Compare goals
goals.description: Use energy goals to measure progress against targets defined by scope.

alerts.title: Handle alerts
alerts.description: Read visible alerts and use clear rules to prevent issues or out-of-range consumption.

service.title: Follow service
service.description: Register support or maintenance when you need a record and status progress.

billing.title: Review billing and preferences
billing.description: Check plan, payments, profile and available preferences without assuming external functions that are not visible.

recommendations.title: How to get value without overconfiguring
recommendations.description: ElectroCorp works better when names, scopes and rules reflect the real operation.

site.title: Create the site first
site.description: The active site prevents the rest of the data from becoming loose or hard to read.

rooms.title: Define rooms before operating
rooms.description: A well-named room helps find devices, routines and maintenance.

assignments.title: Assign devices carefully
assignments.description: Correct assignment improves control and avoids confusion when there are many devices.

groups.title: Use semantic groups
groups.description: Group by real function, not only by temporary convenience.

routines.title: Routines for repeated schedules
routines.description: If an action happens often, a routine is usually better than repeating it manually.

modes.title: Modes for complete situations
modes.description: A mode should represent a full operational scene, not a single isolated action.

energy.title: Review energy and goals together
energy.description: Consumption explains the present; goals help decide what to change.

alerts.title: Use alerts to prevent
alerts.description: Alerts are more useful when reviewed on time and tied to a clear action.

rules.title: Do not overdo rules
rules.description: A few well-defined rules are usually more useful than many rules that are hard to maintain.

names.title: Clear names
names.description: Avoid ambiguous names. A good name reduces errors in operation and follow-up.

capabilities.title: Capabilities connected in the experience
capabilities.description: These areas already exist in the platform and are presented as available functions, not future promises.

spaces.title: Sites, rooms and assignments
spaces.description: Organizes the physical base on which operation is controlled.

control.title: Devices, groups and routines
control.description: Operates equipment, groups it and schedules repeatable actions.

modes.title: Situations with internal routines
modes.description: Organizes complete actions for concrete moments of the day.

energy.title: Consumption, history, reports and goals
energy.description: Reads available energy information and compares it with targets.

alerts.title: Inbox, rules and visible preferences
alerts.description: Reviews alerts and adjusts rules or visible preferences in the experience.

service.title: Support and maintenance
service.description: Creates requests and advances their state without adding unavailable actions.

settings.title: Profile, billing and settings
settings.description: Reviews user information, plan, payments and available preferences.

careful.title: Where transparency matters
careful.description: Some parts depend on real data, clear rules or information available by plan. That is why they are shown with honest scope.

automation.title: Automations
automation.description: They should be created with clear schedules and scopes to avoid unexpected actions.

alerts.title: Alerts and rules
alerts.description: They work better with understandable ranges and a few rules that are easy to review.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Report value depends on real readings and well-chosen filters.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Visible information depends on the plan, payments and history available inside the platform.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.content: The route you entered does not exist or was moved.

devices.subtitle: Manage smart plugs, switches and lights from a centralized view.

notificationPreferences.title: Notification preferences
notificationPreferences.subtitle: Configure how and when you want to receive ElectroCorp notifications.
notificationPreferences.sensitivityDescription: Adjust visible categories, noise, preliminary weights, and alert output for your user.
notificationPreferences.editorDescription: Channels, sources, and silences are saved; weights and ranges are ready for the next contract.
notificationPreferences.emptyDescription: When the user preference is available, you will be able to edit inbox visibility.

summary.rangesDescription: Limits remain contiguous to avoid overlaps.
summary.successDescription: Good events do not compete with risk.
summary.parametersDescription: Controls priority, repetition, schedules, and sources.

notificationPreferences.weightedClassificationDescription: Success stays outside risk. Stable, Neutral, Warning, and Critical are calculated by contiguous ranges.
notificationPreferences.previewDescription: The technical score does not need to appear in the inbox; here it only calibrates the category.
notificationPreferences.positiveEventsDescription: Correct actions, recoveries, completed goals, and successful applications.
notificationPreferences.showSuccessDescription: Keeps the good visible without mixing it with risk.
notificationPreferences.allowedLevelsDescription: The current contract stores these levels; Neutral persists as INFO.
notificationPreferences.criticalOnlyDescription: Reduces noise and lets only urgent events through.
notificationPreferences.contextParametersDescription: These weights are preliminary: they adjust the preview and prepare the next contract.
notificationPreferences.channelsAndNoiseDescription: These parameters are already saved in the current preference.
notificationPreferences.scheduleAndExceptionsDescription: Critical can break silence if you allow it.

levelDescriptions.warning: Receive only preventive and critical events.

sourceDescriptions.device: Status, response, and direct equipment consumption.
sourceDescriptions.goal: Progress, risk of exceeding, or completion.

form.identityDescription: Controlled name and description for the mode.
form.applicationDescription: The mode can cover a complete site or a room.
form.modeRoutinesDescription: These routines belong only to this mode.
form.label: Label
form.noTargetsInScope: No targets are available in this scope.
form.noInternalRoutinesDescription: Add at least one internal routine to save the mode.

applicationDescriptions.workplace: The mode applies to the whole active site
applicationDescriptions.room: The mode applies only to one room

scheduleDescriptions.allDay: The mode keeps its configuration without a time window

goals.description: Reference real goals without promising extra control.
goals.emptyDescription: The mode can be saved without associated goals.

rules.noneDescription: The mode will not apply rules

validation.siteRequired: Select a site before creating the mode.
validation.nameRequired: Enter a name for the mode.
validation.roomRequired: Select a room for the mode.
validation.noTargets: No devices or groups are available in the selected scope.
validation.routineRequired: Add an internal routine or complete the routine being edited.
validation.routineDraftRequired: Complete the mode routine name and target.
validation.minimumRequired: Define site, name, and at least one internal routine.

confirm.replaceMessage: There is already an active mode in this site. If you activate this mode, the previous one will be disabled.
confirm.archiveMessage: {{name}} will be archived. Its internal routines will stop acting.

profile.title: Personal data
profile.pageDescription: Manage the name and email saved in your ElectroCorp account.
profile.basicInfoDescription: This data is saved in your ElectroCorp account.
profile.dataUsageDescription: Quick reference for how name and email appear inside ElectroCorp.
profile.visibleNameDescription: Used to identify your account in the side panel and user views.
profile.accountEmailDescription: Used as the reference for access recovery and main profile data.
profile.statusDescription: Save the profile to sync data with the current session.

account.title: Account status
account.pageDescription: Review identity, role and general status for the authenticated user.
account.identityDescription: Compact summary of the authenticated user.
account.operationalReadingDescription: Elements that help understand account scope without mixing sensitive actions.
account.sessionDescription: This view is shown only for a user authenticated by the access guard.
account.editableDataDescription: Name and email are updated from Profile to keep this page as an account summary.
account.sensitiveActionsDescription: Recovery and account deletion live on a separate screen to reduce mistakes.

security.title: Access and recovery
security.pageDescription: Manage sensitive access actions with available real calls.
security.accessActionsDescription: Only actions with an available real call are shown.
security.sendRecoveryDescription: Use the real access recovery flow for the email saved in the profile.
security.deleteAccountDescription: Opens a strict confirmation before deleting the current account.
security.securityStatusDescription: Summary of active controls before executing sensitive actions.
security.recoveryEmailDescription: The recovery link is requested for the current email of the authenticated account.
security.writtenConfirmationDescription: Deletion remains blocked until the confirmation text matches exactly.
security.finalConfirmationDescription: The account is deleted only after accepting the danger confirmation dialog.
security.noRecoveryEmail: No email is registered for access recovery.
security.deleteDialogMessage: This action deletes your ElectroCorp account, closes your session and cannot be undone from the interface.
security.deleteDialogDetail: Before continuing, verify that you do not need access to data, invoices or preferences associated with this account.
security.requiredTextLabel: To confirm, type exactly this word:
security.requiredTextHint: The delete button will remain blocked until the confirmation matches exactly.

platform.title: Local preferences
platform.pageDescription: Adjust ElectroCorp appearance and language in this browser.
platform.browserExperienceDescription: Applied in this browser and kept locally.
platform.darkModeDescription: Change the interface appearance in this browser.
platform.preferencesSummaryDescription: Confirm how the experience is configured in this browser.
platform.appearanceDescription: The visual preference applies to the shell and shared interface components.
platform.activeLanguageDescription: The selected language is kept locally to maintain consistent navigation.
platform.scopeDescription: These settings live in the current browser and are ready to sync with user preferences.

billing.title: Plan and payments
billing.pageDescription: Manage your active subscription, review registered payments and download invoices issued for your account.
billing.planStatusDescription: Real information for the active plan, operational limits and payment activity.
billing.choosePlanDescription: Choose a plan to activate the full platform.
billing.registeredMovementsDescription: Payments received from the real subscription flow.
billing.noPaymentsDescription: Payments will appear when you activate or renew a plan.
billing.issuedDocumentsDescription: Download only invoices that exist in your account.
billing.noInvoicesDescription: When an invoice is issued for your account, it will appear here.
billing.cancelPlanMessage: Your active subscription will be canceled. Confirm only if you no longer want to continue with the plan.
